name: TestWaitForMostPkt
title: TestWaitForMostPkt
syntax: long TestWaitForMostPkt(long aSourceAddress, long aDestinationAddress, char aPktDataDesc[], long aInstanceID, dword aTimeout);
description: Waits for the occurrence of the specified MOST packet. Should the event not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

Note, that the first and third signatures are exclusively suited to set up wait conditions for packets having function catalog format, whereas the other signatures also allow the definition of raw packets.

parameters.name: Note For parameters aSourceAddress, aDestinationAddress, and aInstanceId the following applies: If -1 is given, the corresponding field can get any value. This is also the standard for not explicit set values.

return: -6: Parse Error; on specification of a packet description string, that can’t be resolved with the XML function catalog or that is flawed
